message:
fix(runtime): reorder ACL display fields and simplify default-user init

In fr-runtime's AclUser display logic (both `commands_string` callers used
for `ACL LIST` / `ACL GETUSER`-style output), the command token sequence
is now emitted after the key/channel pattern tokens, matching Redis'
canonical ordering: `user ... passwords ~* &<pattern> +@all` rather than
`user ... passwords +@all ~* &<pattern>`. The core_acl.json conformance
fixture is updated in lockstep so the expected `user default on
sanitize-payload nopass ~* &* +@all` string reflects the new ordering
(keys -> channels -> commands).

AclUser::new_default() no longer threads an AclPubsubDefault through the
constructor — the default user always grants `all_channels = true`
regardless of the global ACL pubsub default, so the parameter is dropped
at both the definition and the sole call site in
AuthState::with_acl_pubsub_default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
